title: carex meiocarpa
intro: Carex meiocarpa, also known as the alpine sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex meiocarpa are said to include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or salves, and are often used topically to promote wound healing and soothe irritated skin.
